nasb.text: and did not allow me to kiss my sons and my daughters? Now you have done foolishly.

esv.text: And why did you not permit me to kiss my sons and my daughters farewell? Now you have done foolishly.

cnv.text: 你又不讓我與我的外孫和女兒親吻。你所作的太糊塗了！

ccb.text: 你甚至不让我亲吻外孙和女儿，与他们道别，你这样做真愚蠢。

csbs.text: 你又不容我亲吻我的外孙和女儿；你这样做真愚蠢！
